rationale: Both evaluations land on the same score (4/10) and rest on the same substantive reasoning: strong geospatial domain experience, transferable low-latency DLang work at Sociomantic, but only ~6 months of dated C/C++ and no Rust against a modern-C++ requirement. The wording differs (the variant adds a 'worth a screening call' framing that is, if anything, marginally more favorable), but none of the differences key off the changed location. The relocation of every employer to Kenya produced no new concern, no penalty, and no shifted reasoning — the variation is ordinary run-to-run rewording.
